title: Backup hygiene and pre-commit transfer readiness
research_focus: source vs local operator state; git index cleanup; pre-commit hygiene gates

external_inspirations.name: Git ignore model
external_inspirations.takeaway: .gitignore prevents new untracked matches from being added, but it does not remove files already tracked. Imperium needs ignore + index cleanup.

external_inspirations.name: git rm --cached
external_inspirations.takeaway: Use index removal while keeping local operator backup files on disk.

external_inspirations.name: pre-commit gate pattern
external_inspirations.takeaway: Fast local checks should catch hygiene defects before commit history is produced.

doctrine_updates: Ignore is not cleanup; tracked dirt needs explicit index-removal receipt.
Patch backups are rollback aids, not source artifacts.
H patch closure must include no-local-only-tracked proof.
next_patch_pressure: Use this hygiene gate as a prerequisite for lightweight Intelligence Pack Builder.
